rationale: This benchmark tests the agent's ability to perform a precise structural edit in a product delivery runbook by moving a complete subsection with all its contents, while avoiding decoy elements and ignoring archived heading text. The task requires careful parsing of Markdown structure.
task_description: Move the complete level-3 subsection titled "Delivery Receipt Verification" from its current level-2 parent section to another level-2 parent section, placing it before the level-3 subsection named "Customer Handoff". Ensure the decoy subsection "Delivery Receipt Verification" remains untouched and any archived instances of the heading text are ignored.
input_markdown:
# Product Delivery Runbook

## Pre-Delivery Preparation

### Packaging and Labeling

- Verify all items are correctly packaged
- Confirm shipping labels are accurate

## Delivery Execution

### Delivery Receipt Verification

This subsection covers verifying the delivery receipt.

- Check delivery receipt against manifest
- Confirm customer signature

```
Delivery Receipt Verification
```

### Route Planning

- Plan optimal delivery route
- Account for traffic conditions

## Post-Delivery Procedures

### Customer Handoff

- Complete customer handoff checklist
- Provide delivery receipt copy

### Delivery Receipt Verification

This is a decoy subsection that must remain in place.

- Archive: Delivery Receipt Verification
- Archive: Delivery Receipt Verification

### Returns Processing

- Handle any returned items
- Update inventory records
